overview: Zaren Veto is a premium, privacy-focused social networking application built on the Internet Computer. It delivers full Facebook-equivalent features including Stories, Explore with hashtags, friend requests, advanced post privacy, admin dashboard, polls, pinned posts, and real-time messaging enhancements — all with end-to-end encryption, dark mode, and multilingual support (Arabic, French, English).
features: Stories with 24-hour expiry and viewer tracking
Explore page with trending hashtags and search
Profile About section (bio, location, work, education, website)
Owner-only Admin Dashboard for verification and moderation
Polls in posts with real-time vote results
Verification badge exclusive to owner (Princess Narzine Bani Hashem)
